lines.text: Well done, Carlotta. And thank you, {PlayerName}.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: My girl could not have accomplished this without your assistance.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: I had faith in you two, but you surpassed my expectations.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: It appears I underestimated the potential that you possess when working together.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Capollo and his lackeys will face the consequences of their actions. Our code is simple—vengeance for blood, death for life. No one is exempt.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: There's a lot at play here. It will require some effort and a true Montelli at my side to handle it.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: It would be my honor if you do.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: You don't seem very surprised to learn who I am.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: What's the term for it... A destined encounter? The universe brought us together, and I happened to take the initiative. It's almost poetic, wouldn't you agree?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: That's it, I doubt you want more chit-chat. I know you're here for that Terminal.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Let Pierre inspect it for you and we can resume our conversation.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Remember that painting we discussed earlier?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: In a fragile equilibrium, the smaller piece is forced to repress its true nature. It's confined to a seemingly flawless structure, stripped of its autonomy. I don't want the same fate for her.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: But I can't simply impose my path upon her, expecting blind obedience. She must find her own path, with a partner she can fully trust.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: As for those who betray their own blood, there will be no leniency. Even my own son is not exempt from this.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: However, before I intervene, I want to see her plan take shape. My hand should only be played as a final measure.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: The old give way to the new, that is the way of the world. But for us Montellis, the courage to break from the past matters far more than clinging to it.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: So, I ask you this favor. When the time is right, give this to her. She will need it.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: She's already there, so why bother? I trust Carlotta and our esteemed guest. It is a trap, but also an opportunity for her to mature.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: It would be my honor if you do.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: You don't seem very surprised to learn who I am.
